title: urostigma littorale
intro: Urostigma littorale, also known as the coastal sterculia or sea sterculia, is a plant species native to tropical coastal regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Urostigma littorale include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as the alleviation of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create medicinal teas, syrups, and topical creams for various health applications.
